chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – What are rejected, from the witnesses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/249)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/249)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تَجُوزُ شَهَادَةُ وَلَدِ الزِّنَى .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazzaz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The testimony of the son of adultery is not allowed’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from abu Ayyub al-Khazzaz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The testimony of one born out of wedlock is not admissible.’”
